description: Fix `dedupe_preserve_order` in collections_utils.py: it currently raises TypeError on unhashable items (lists, dicts). The function should deduplicate items of any type while preserving input order.
entry_instruction: You are helping fix a bug in this repository.
goal: All tests in tests/test_collections_utils.py pass when running `pytest -q tests/test_collections_utils.py` from the repository root.
